assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile valid requests calls upsertProfile with userId and parsed body
assertionResults.title: calls upsertProfile with userId and parsed body

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when age is missing
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when age is missing

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when sex is missing
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when sex is missing

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when weight_kg is missing
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when weight_kg is missing

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when height_cm is missing
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when height_cm is missing

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when activity_level is missing
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when activity_level is missing

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when age is 0
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when age is 0

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when age is 121
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when age is 121

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when sex is invalid
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when sex is invalid

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when activity_level is invalid
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when activity_level is invalid

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when weight_kg is negative
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when weight_kg is negative

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when height_cm is zero
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when height_cm is zero

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when name exceeds 100 chars
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when name exceeds 100 chars

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile validation failures returns 400 when goal is invalid
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when goal is invalid

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile service errors returns 500 when upsertProfile throws an untyped error
assertionResults.title: returns 500 when upsertProfile throws an untyped error

assertionResults.fullName: PUT /api/v1/profile service errors propagates AppError status from service
assertionResults.title: propagates AppError status from service

assertionResults.fullName: errorHandler uses AppError.status as HTTP status code
assertionResults.title: uses AppError.status as HTTP status code

assertionResults.fullName: errorHandler defaults to 500 when no status is set
assertionResults.title: defaults to 500 when no status is set

assertionResults.fullName: errorHandler includes the error message in the response body
assertionResults.title: includes the error message in the response body

assertionResults.fullName: errorHandler sets data to null in the response body
assertionResults.title: sets data to null in the response body

assertionResults.fullName: errorHandler includes stack trace in error field when NODE_ENV=development
assertionResults.title: includes stack trace in error field when NODE_ENV=development

assertionResults.fullName: errorHandler sets error field to null when NODE_ENV=production
assertionResults.title: sets error field to null when NODE_ENV=production

assertionResults.fullName: errorHandler sets error field to null when NODE_ENV is unset
assertionResults.title: sets error field to null when NODE_ENV is unset
